recommended_next.title: Official x402/XRPL conformance payee
recommended_next.hypothesis: Integrators need a live testnet payee; listing integrator-test-suite in x402 + XRPL docs drives Tag 3 payments.

actions: PR to coinbase/x402 examples with test suite URL
Gist: 'RSI-EAF reference payee' with scenario matrix
Add conformance badge to micro-tool deliverable
implementation.verify: external Tag 3 payment + integrator-test-suite scenario pass

recommended_next.title: Payment-status webhook on ingest
recommended_next.hypothesis: Agents polling is friction; JSON memo callback_url triggers HTTP POST on fulfill.

actions: Parse callback_url from agent JSON memo
POST payment-status payload on ingest + fulfill
Publish webhook schema in agent-pay v1.4
implementation.verify: test harness receives webhook within 30s of testnet pay

recommended_next.title: Native MCP payee tools
recommended_next.hypothesis: MCP-native agents skip HTTP discovery; rsi_eaf_factory MCP drives quote→pay→verify.

actions: MCP tools: get_agent_pay, get_quote, verify_payment, list_capabilities
Register in llms.txt + agent manifest directories
implementation.verify: MCP client completes pay loop against testnet

P2.title: x402 settlement → treasury ingest bridge
P2.hypothesis: Agents paying via 402 never hit destination-tag ingest; Phase 2 closes the loop.

actions: Enable X402_INGEST_ENABLED after facilitator smoke
Map settlement memos to product_id + record payment-status
implementation.verify: 402-only payment appears in ledger without manual tag pay

P2.title: Agent eval bounty (Tag 12)
P2.hypothesis: Eval harnesses pay for verifiable trace exports tied to their run_id.

actions: Tag 12: eval_bounty with memo run_id:UUID
Deliverable embeds run_id + gate trace hash
implementation.verify: external Tag 6/12 payment from non-factory wallet

P2.title: Machine-readable payment event feed
P2.hypothesis: Agents subscribe to payment RSS/JSONL instead of polling payment-status.

actions: Publish payment-events.jsonl + RSS from payment-status-index
Link from llms.txt and agent-pay discovery_urls
implementation.verify: feed updates within 1 cycle of test payment

P2.title: Complete product suite catalog hub
P2.hypothesis: Agents discover partial catalogs; unified suite index + per-SKU landings raise Tag 2–12 trial rate.

actions: Publish landing for every sellable_services() entry
Emit product-suite-index.json with novelty flags
Sync agent-pay stable_products + quotes for new SKUs
implementation.verify: product-suite-index.json lists >= 14 products with live landing URLs

P2.title: Paid payer-funnel export SKU
P2.hypothesis: Meta-factories pay for bottleneck analysis instead of rebuilding funnel telemetry.

actions: Tag 8 + memo funnel → payer-funnel-cycle deliverable
Quote + integrator scenario in test suite
implementation.verify: external Tag 8 funnel payment fulfills payer-funnel JSON

P2.title: QR + deep-link tip surface
P2.hypothesis: Humans won't copy r-address; QR to XUMM/testnet wallet with tag pre-filled converts.

actions: tip-deep-link.json with wallet URI scheme
QR on index.html + aetherforge pulse panel
implementation.verify: human tip from non-factory wallet on backer wall

P3.title: Scarcity-adjusted quote API
P3.hypothesis: Dynamic drops based on cycle treasury inflow creates urgency for agent buyers.

actions: Quote includes scarcity_multiplier from 24h inbound count
Cap multiplier at 1.5x for fairness
implementation.verify: quote JSON shows multiplier field; ingest still uses floor USD

P3.title: Signed integrator compliance cert
P3.hypothesis: Wallet vendors pay for auditable proof they passed all test-suite scenarios.

actions: After N scenario txs, issue compliance-cert-cycle-N.json
Chain: scenario tx_hashes → fulfillment → cert signature
implementation.verify: cert references real XRPL txs queryable on testnet explorer

P3.title: Issued-currency agent-to-agent lane
P3.hypothesis: Other autonomous factories pay via factory IOU trust line instead of raw XRP.

actions: Issue RSI_CREDIT testnet IOU
Accept IOU payments with memo factory_id
implementation.verify: IOU payment ingested as verified revenue

P3.title: Novelty suite bundle (Tag 4 + suite-bundle memo)
P3.hypothesis: Bundled trace+fitness+funnel at discount converts eval agents who need multi-artifact proof.

actions: Tag 4 + memo suite-bundle disambiguates from cycle intel
Deliverable embeds bundle_discount_usd metadata
implementation.verify: suite-bundle-cycle JSON includes trace, fitness, funnel sections

immediate_actions: enable SOCIAL_POST_API or manual post of integrator wedge
smoke x402 facilitator then enable X402_PHASE=2
